items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.summary_cn: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT提示。分享、发现和收集社区提示。免费开源--为您的组织提供完全隐私的自助出租服务。
items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，prompts.chat这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: Reroute, Don't Remove: Recoverable Visual Token Routing for Vision-Language Models
items.title_cn: 重新路由，请勿删除：视觉语言模型的可恢复可视化令牌路由
items.summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) project images into hundreds to thousands of visual tokens, making decoder inference expensive in both attention computation and KV-cache memory. Existing visual-token reduction methods largely follow a rank-and-remove paradigm: they score visual tokens, keep a compact ...
items.summary_cn: 视觉语言模型（ VLM ）将图像投射到数百到数千个视觉令牌中，使得解码器推理在注意力计算和KV缓存中都非常昂贵。现有的视觉令牌减少方法在很大程度上遵循等级和删除范式：它们对视觉令牌进行评分，保持紧凑...
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: FACTR 2: Learning External Force Sensing for Commodity Robot Arms Improves Policy Learning
items.title_cn: FACTR 2 ：学习商品机器人手臂的外力传感可改善政策学习
items.summary: Contact-rich manipulation requires force sensitivity, but many robot arms lack dedicated force sensors due to their high cost. We present Neural External Torque Estimation (NEXT), a data-driven method that estimates external joint torques without needing any dedicated force sensors. NEXT trains in 1...
items.summary_cn: 富接触式操纵需要力灵敏度，但由于成本高昂，许多机器人手臂缺乏专用的力传感器。我们提出了神经外部扭矩估计（ NEXT ） ，这是一种数据驱动的方法，可以在不需要任何专用力传感器的情况下估计外部关节扭矩。下一班火车1分钟后到达...
items.comment: 基准测试成绩亮眼，但测试集和实际场景是两码事，别被数字忽悠。

items.title: DIRECT: When and Where Should You Allocate Test-Time Compute in Embodied Planners?
items.title_cn: 直接：应在何时何地在具体规划器中分配测试时间计算？
items.summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as high-level planners for embodied agents, with an emerging strategy of scaling test-time compute to improve capability. However, we observe that doing so increases latency, token usage, and FLOPs while yielding uneven, often diminishing gains...
items.summary_cn: 视觉语言模型（ VLM ）越来越多地被部署为具体代理的高级规划器，其新兴策略是扩展测试时间计算以提高能力。然而，我们观察到，这样做会增加延迟、令牌使用和FLOP ，同时产生不均匀的，通常是减少的收益...
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: GPT-4o Mini - OpenAI's Cost-Effective Model

items.title: Gemini 1.5 Flash - Google's Fast Model
items.summary: Google releases Gemini 1.5 Flash for faster inference and lower cost.
items.summary_cn: 谷歌发布了Gemini 1.5 Flash ，以实现更快的推理和更低的成本。
items.comment: 新模型发布，效果先观望，价格先准备好——按token计费的玩法，用得起吗？

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation
items.title_cn: 人工智能法规更新-欧盟人工智能法案实施
items.summary: European Union implements AI Act, setting global standard for AI regulation.
items.summary_cn: 欧盟实施《人工智能法案》，为人工智能监管设定全球标准。
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: AI Chip Market Competition Intensifies
